error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Please check the network connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: A device with this MAC address is already configured.

user.title: Gree Climate Setup
user.description: Choose how to add your Gree air conditioner

discovery.title: Discovered Devices
discovery.description: Found {devices_found} Gree device(s). Select one to add or choose manual setup.

detect_encryption.title: Configure Device
detect_encryption.description: Device connection successful. Enter a name for this device.

manual.title: Manual Setup
manual.description: Enter the details for your Gree air conditioner

options.discover: Discover devices on the local network

target_temp_step.name: Temperature Step
target_temp_step.description: Sets the increment step for adjusting the target temperature.

external_temperature_sensor.name: External Temperature Sensor
external_temperature_sensor.description: Select a temperature sensor entity to use instead of the built-in AC sensor. Choose 'None' to use the built-in sensor.

smart_wind.name: i Sense
smart_wind.description: Aims the airflow relative to the people in the room. 'Avoid' keeps the air from blowing directly at them, 'Follow' directs it towards them.

xfan.name: X-Fan
xfan.description: Enables or disables the X-Fan mode for extra drying when turning off.

lights.name: Lights
lights.description: Controls the display lights on the air conditioner unit.

health.name: Health
health.description: Enables or disables the Health mode for air ionization and purification.

powersave.name: Power Save
powersave.description: Enables or disables the power saving mode for energy efficiency. Only available in cooling mode.

eightdegheat.name: 8°C Heat
eightdegheat.description: Enables or disables the 8°C heating mode for frost protection. Only available in heating mode.

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.description: Enables or disables the sleep mode for comfortable overnight operation. Only available in cooling or heating mode.

auto_xfan.name: Auto X-Fan
auto_xfan.description: Automatically controls the X-Fan mode based on HVAC operations. When enabled, X-Fan will automatically turn on in cooling and dry modes.

auto_light.name: Auto Light
auto_light.description: Automatically controls the display lights based on HVAC operations. When enabled, lights will turn on/off with the AC unit.

light_sensor.name: Light Sensor
light_sensor.description: Enables or disables light sensor for automatic brightness. Requires lights to be enabled.

aux_heat.name: Auxiliary Heat
aux_heat.description: Enables the auxiliary electric heater. Only available in heating mode.
